hero.title:
Your real estate
on the French Riviera.
hero.body: Independent real estate agent on the French Riviera, from Cannes to Menton, I guide you in English, French and Spanish to buy, sell or manage your property — from first viewing to key handover.

profile.title:
A local expert,
in your language.
profile.name: Elodie Fleury
profile.p1: Independent real estate agent on the French Riviera, from Cannes to Menton (partner network), I'm also founder of YourBnB06, my seasonal property management concierge service along the entire coast.
profile.p2: What sets me apart: I speak fluent Spanish and have an active network in the Hispanic community. I also welcome English-speaking buyers and investors looking for their piece of the Riviera.
profile.quote_fr_text: "She has rare energy — she never gives up. She sold our apartment when every other agent had failed."
profile.quote_es_text: "Élodie speaks Spanish, knows the French Riviera inside out and guided us every step. Without her, it would have been very hard from Spain."

services.title: What I do for you
services.vente_desc: Free valuation, property staging, multi-platform listing, buyer selection. With you until the final notary signature.
services.achat_desc: Targeted search, full support for non-residents: legal steps, notary, financing options.
services.concierge_desc: Full short-term rental management: listing, bookings, premium check-in, hotel-grade upkeep. 20% flat fee.

gallery.title:
From Nice to Cagnes,
carefully presented homes.

zones.query:
From Cannes to Menton,
I'm where you need me.

reviews.title: What my clients say
reviews.score_source: Google My Business · Immodvisor · partner network
reviews.r1_text: "She is deeply involved, has rare energy, is competent and responsive. She sold my apartment when every other agent had failed."
reviews.r2_text: "Her client portfolio made the difference, with serious buyers from the very first viewings. Sale closed in a few days."
reviews.r3_text: "Out of 4 properties to sell, Élodie helped sell 2 in perfect collaboration. Exemplary professionalism and responsiveness."
reviews.r4_text: "I handed my villa management to Élodie. Every time I return, it's even cleaner than with my usual housekeeper."
